features.label: Cookie Manager
features.desc: Full cookie management in Settings. Overview tab: all cookies grouped by domain with expand/collapse, per-cookie delete, per-domain delete, delete all/expired. Browse tab: search by domain/name/value with live filter. Block tab: custom domain blocklist + 10 known tracker quick-block buttons. Export tab: JSON export/import, blocklist export. Stats row: total, domains, expired, session, secure counts. Domain cookies scrollable with max-height. Loading spinner.
